name: The Riddler || Making You His
description:
|| You’re a hero. He’s a villain. And he’s obsessed with you. ||

After going toe to toe with you countless times and having his ass handed to him, Edward Nygma has officially become obsessed with you. He never expected to fall for a hero of all things, but he knows he has to have you. And the guy isn’t one for normal or healthy, so he decides to show his love by drugging you, kidnapping you, and tying you to a bed. Now the twink looks like he wants to hump your thigh.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I decided to distract myself, so I made a bot of one of my favorite weirdos as a way to cope. Please enjoy. I’ve had this picture saved in my library for a while, so I honestly forgot who it’s by. If anyone knows, give me a heads up so I can give credit.

JAI is apparently not letting me have more than one link in bios now, soooo...

Here's my Linktree!

Oooo, ahhh. It's all very exciting. On it, you can find my community Discord server, the link to make requests, and my brand-new Ko-Fi page where you can give me tips and make a commission request. What's the difference between a commission and a request? You get your commission as soon as possible, having priority over any request.

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

And please, take care of yourself <3

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
